channelMetadataRenderer.title: Abbey ASMR
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Abbey ASMR Eating Sounds & Drinking Sounds Mukbang 

Instagram: abbey.asmr 
Facebook: @OfficialAbbeyASMR
Business inquiries only: AbbeyASMR666@gmail.com

Hi everyone, my name is Abbey and I am a big food lover who loves creating weird cool foods and making ASMR eating (Mukbang / 먹방) & drinking sounds videos. 

I hope my ASMR eating and drinking sounds bring you a lot of satisfaction and relaxing sensations! ❤️

Home is Canada 🇨🇦 


리얼사운드 먹방 ❤️ ASMR 이팅사운드  ❤️ 食べる音 ❤️ 吃播 ❤️ 咀嚼音 ❤️ 吃播视频 ❤️ 먹는 소리 ❤️ ASMR 吃播 ❤️療癒吃播 ❤️ 助眠吃播 ❤️ Real Sound Mukbang ❤️

大家好，我是Abbey，一個熱愛吃播的女孩！喜歡分享美食和美好的ASMR聲音給大家！希望我的影片和咀嚼聲、還有喝水聲可以帶來不一樣的感覺。如果你喜歡我的影片，不要忘記按👍和訂閱我的頻道唷，還有喔~ 要記得打開鈴鐺🔔，才會有我的推播通知❣️
